title: Gemini can now automate some multi-step tasks on Android
description: Gemini on Android will be able to automate tasks involving rideshare requests, or grocery or food delivery, says Google.
content: Gemini on Android will be able to automate tasks involving rideshare requests, or grocery or food delivery, says Google.
